scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.kill:port: powershell.exe -Command "$p = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess; if ($p) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; Write-Host 'Killed PID' $p } else { Write-Host 'Port 5000 is free' }"
scripts.dev:safe: npm run kill:port && npm run dev
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix .gitnexus-tools
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix .gitnexus-tools
